AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $116.60 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, SIU HING AKA SIU HING YUEN LO LO, WEI MING AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, KAREN KWAI AKA KAREN CHAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, KAREN KWAI AKA KAREN CHAN $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,750.00 INTEREST, $116.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,691.60
